document.source_title: IPL 2026 Playoff Scenarios: With 7 matches to go, SRH and GT qualify; final spot up for grabs

claims.claim_text: RCB, GT, and SRH have qualified for the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: RCB, GT and SRH have now qualified.

claims.claim_text: LSG and MI are out of contention for the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: LSG and MI are already out of contention for the playoffs.

entities.name: RCB
entities.description: Royal Challengers Bangalore, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: RCB are now sure to qualify and to at least finish tied for no.1 in terms of points.

entities.name: GT
entities.description: Gujarat Titans, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: SRH’s win over CSK on Monday means that both SRH and GT have qualified.

entities.name: SRH
entities.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: SRH’s win over CSK on Monday means that both SRH and GT have qualified.

entities.name: RR
entities.description: Rajasthan Royals, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: RR have a 43.8% chance of ending up among the top four on points.

entities.name: PBKS
entities.description: Punjab Kings, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: PBKS can at best finish sole fourth (28.1% chance) or tie for fourth spot with KKR.

entities.name: KKR
entities.description: Kolkata Knight Riders, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: KKR’s chances of making the last four singly or jointly are now at 20.3%.

entities.name: DC
entities.description: Delhi Capitals, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: DC’s chances of making the last four singly or jointly are now at 18.8%.

entities.name: CSK
entities.description: Chennai Super Kings, a team in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: CSK’s best case scenario after Monday’s loss are tied fourth with RR or DC or both.
